heading: Omitted
label: 329 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , ; , , , which prescribed the maximum base rate of pay for employees conducting meteorological investigations in the Arctic region, was from an appropriation act and was omitted in view of which authorizes the Secretary of Commerce to establish the rates of compensation for such personnel. Provisions of this section were repeated in , , .Pub. L. 85–469, title I, § 10172 Stat. 234Pub. L. 86–88, title I, § 10173 Stat. 207section 327 of this titlePub.
